title: Paid Search
titleLarge: Scale search campaigns with data-driven bidding and creative that converts.
desc: Maximize ROI on Google, Bing and beyond with audience targeting and conversion tracking.
shortDesc: Scale search campaigns with data-driven bidding and creative that converts.
desc1: ONE Agency delivers performance-driven digital strategies through a fusion of our proprietary tech stack, persuasive creative and actionable data analytics.
desc2: Real-time visibility into leads, sales, CPL, CPA, creative performance and more is available in myONE Dash.
serviceOverview: We align paid search strategy with your goals: keyword research, audience targeting, and conversion tracking on Google, Bing and beyond. Campaigns are optimized for CPL and CPA with real-time visibility in myONE Dash.
keyFeatures: Google and Bing search campaigns with smart bidding
Ongoing optimization for CPL and ROI

featureCards.title: Smart bidding & keywords
featureCards.desc: Keyword research, match types and bid strategies tuned for Google and Bing so you capture intent and control CPA.

featureCards.title: Audience & conversion tracking
featureCards.desc: Audience targeting and conversion tracking so you see which searches and segments drive leads and sales.

featureCards.title: Real-time search performance
featureCards.desc: CPL, CPA and search metrics in myONE Dash so you can optimize and scale with full visibility.

process.title: How We Partner
process.titleLarge: From strategy to execution we work backwards from your objectives.
process.desc: We focus on outcomes: define goals and KPIs, audit data and creative, launch and optimize campaigns.
